"[7] RP TOOK VEH KEYS AWAY FROM BOYFRIEND // PARENTS ARE WITH BOYFRIEND TO LOOK FOR SISTER - BOYFRIEND RAN AWAY FROM PARENTS WHEN AT RIVERBED AT GAGE - UNK WHERE HE IS NOW // HMA 24YOA - MUSTACHE - BLK HAIR // LSW GRY HOODIE"
"[6] RP IS SEARCHING RIVERBED FOR SISTER // RP CONCERNED SISTER IS HURT SOMEWHERE AROUND OFR"
"[4] THE BOYFRIEND - EDWIN CAME BACK TO VEH STATING HE DIDN'T KNOW WHAT HAPPENED TO HIS SISTER - SHE WAS SITTING UNDER A TREE NEAR RIVERBED "
"[3] RP ADVS SISTERS BOYFRIEND CALLED AT APPROX 0530 HRS STATING SOMETHING WAS WRONG W/ VEH // WHEN RP ARRIVED TO EVH BOTH SISTER AND BOYFRIEND WERE NOT AT VEH // PHONES WERE STILL INSIDE"

details.IncidentDetail: "[3] ^CT COPIES // WRONG WAY SIGNS ARE AN IMMEDIATE CALL OUT PER CT SOP"
"[1] 4X6 SIGN POST KNOCKED DOWN/ WRONG WAY SIGN ALSO DOWN / BOTH POST AND SIGN NEED REPLACEMENT"
